name: gowth-mem
description: Persistent topic-organized memory for Claude Code. Global ~/.gowth-mem/ synced across machines via your own git remote. v3.9 = provenance & verification layer: TYPE-encoded epistemic status — verified [ref] (Source) vs new UNVERIFIED [hypothesis] (Verify: path, exempt from hedge gate, promotes to [ref] when confirmed) + new [goal] type (user intent: Status lifecycle + verifiable Done-when, never deleted); commits now state WHY/WHAT/WHEN deterministically (Why: line + When: knowledge-date + Why-Code: trailer). v3.8: file+content schema validators, hard write-gate, active forgetting. v3.4: tag-aware FTS5, /mem-dream (Light/REM/Deep), /mem-recall. Multi-session safe via fcntl locks, AI-mediated conflict resolution, mem0 ADD/UPDATE/DELETE/NOOP write semantics.
